morning.title: OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks
morning.summary: OpenAI introduces Lockdown Mode to safeguard sensitive data from potential vulnerabilities in AI models.

morning.title: Beyond Instagram: Introducing the next generation of social apps
morning.summary: The next generation of social apps is emerging, focused on community, privacy, and new forms of interaction.

morning.title: IBM acquires Red Hat
morning.summary: IBM's acquisition of Red Hat aims to create a leading hybrid cloud provider, expanding IBM's cloud capabilities.

morning.title: Are AI chatbots making us lose control of our brains?
morning.summary: The increasing use of AI chatbots may lead to a loss of control over our own thoughts and decisions, as they influence our behavior and perceptions.

morning.title: Anthropic says 80% of its new production code is now authored by Claude
morning.summary: Anthropic's AI model, Claude, is now responsible for 80% of the company's new production code, showcasing the potential of AI in software development.

gym.title: The easiest (& laziest) way to get rich
gym.summary: The video discusses a straightforward approach to achieving wealth, focusing on simplicity and patience.

gym.summary: The video showcases small, luxurious items that can significantly improve one's daily life, focusing on comfort and well-being.

gym.summary: The video discusses the development of secure payment infrastructure for autonomous economies, featuring a talk by Steve Kaliski from Stripe.

gym.summary: The video offers guidance on identifying and addressing inauthentic content, helping creators to maintain their audience's trust and engagement.
